visual_description: A person with glasses and a jacket stands in a dim, stone-walled corridor with arched windows, looking downward. Two figures in dark clothing stand in the background, one holding a large map, illuminated by a blue glow on the floor. The foreground hand holds a book open to a detailed map, with visible text and symbols.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a high pitch and a tone, speaking at a moderate pace.
